data.title: Dogwood Therapeutics Strengthens Balance Sheet with Debt Conversion
data.description:
Dogwood Therapeutics ( (DWTX) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 12, 2025, Dogwood Therapeutics entered into a Debt Exchange and Cancellation Agreement with Conjoint Inc., converting $19.5 million in debt into equity by issuing Series A-1 Non-Voting Convertible Preferred Stock. This strategic move, supported by the company’s largest shareholder CK Life Sciences Int’l., strengthens Dogwood’s balance sheet and underscores confidence in its lead product, Halneuron®, which is being developed as a non-opioid pain treatment. The agreement allows Dogwood to focus on its Phase 2b clinical trial for chemotherapy-induced neuropathic pain without the burden of debt, potentially enhancing its attractiveness to investors.

More about Dogwood Therapeutics

Dogwood Therapeutics, Inc. is a development-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on creating non-opioid treatments for chronic and acute pain. The company’s lead product, Halneuron®, targets NaV 1.7 voltage-gated sodium channels to reduce pain. Dogwood also has an antiviral program with products like IMC-1 and IMC-2, aimed at treating conditions related to herpesvirus reactivation, such as fibromyalgia and Long-COVID.

YTD Price Performance: 343.43%

Average Trading Volume: 3,609,300

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: $14.83M

data.title: OMNIQ Corp Secures $4.4 Million Logistics Order
data.description:
The latest update is out from OMNIQ Corp ( (OMQS) ).

On March 12, 2025, OMNIQ Corp. announced a $4.4 million order from a major logistics provider for ruggedized handheld mobile computers. This order highlights the increasing demand for robust and intelligent solutions in logistics and supply chain management, enhancing operational efficiency and accuracy. The collaboration with the logistics provider, spanning six years, underscores OMNIQ’s role in driving innovation and efficiency in the industry, with implications for improved fleet management and reduced downtime.

More about OMNIQ Corp

OMNIQ Corp. is a leader in AI automation and enterprise mobility solutions, providing computerized and machine vision image processing solutions using patented AI technology. The company serves various sectors, including supply chain management, public safety, and traffic management, with clients ranging from government agencies to Fortune 500 companies. OMNIQ addresses billion-dollar markets with double-digit growth, such as the Global Smart City & Public Safety markets.

data.title: ISEC Healthcare’s Joint Venture in Malaysia Begins Operations
data.description:
ISEC Healthcare Ltd ( (SG:40T) ) has shared an update.

ISEC Healthcare Ltd. has announced that its joint venture, ISEC (Klang) Sdn. Bhd., has received an operating license from the Ministry of Health Malaysia. This license allows ISEC (Klang) to commence operations as an eye specialist center in Klang, Selangor, Malaysia, which marks a significant step in expanding the company’s service offerings and market presence in the region.

More about ISEC Healthcare Ltd

ISEC Healthcare Ltd., incorporated in Singapore, operates in the healthcare industry with a focus on providing eye care services. The company specializes in operating eye specialist centers and offering ambulatory care services.

data.title: Wai Hung Group Announces Board Reshuffle
data.description:
Wai Hung Group Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:3321) ) has shared an update.

Wai Hung Group Holdings Limited announced changes in its board of directors, with the resignation of Ms. Bohra Shilpa Rajesh as an executive director to focus on other business commitments. The company expressed gratitude for her contributions. Concurrently, Ms. Chen Jianyu was appointed as an executive director, and Ms. Mak Wei Ting Josephine was appointed as an independent non-executive director and chairlady of the nomination committee. These changes aim to strengthen the company’s leadership and strategic direction, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder relations.

More about Wai Hung Group Holdings Ltd.

data.description:
OKEA ASA ( (DE:3SX) ) has shared an announcement.

Chaiwat Kovavisarach, chairman of OKEA’s board of directors, recently purchased 20,000 shares of the company at an average price of NOK 16.89 per share. This transaction reflects confidence in OKEA’s strategic direction and may positively influence stakeholder perception of the company’s market position.

More about OKEA ASA

OKEA ASA is a leading operator focused on mid- and late-life assets on the Norwegian continental shelf. The company is known for its strategy of finding value in areas where others divest, emphasizing growth, value creation, and capital discipline. OKEA is publicly traded on the Oslo Stock Exchange.

data.title: Beeline Holdings Appoints David Kittle as Special Advisor
data.description:
An update from Eastside Distilling ( (BLNE) ) is now available.

On March 12, 2025, Beeline Holdings, Inc., formerly Eastside Distilling, announced the appointment of David G. Kittle, a veteran in the mortgage industry, as Special Advisor to the company and its Board of Directors. Kittle, who has been involved with Beeline since its inception and has extensive experience in the mortgage sector, will provide strategic guidance to the executive team as the company continues its rapid expansion and gains market share against larger lenders. This appointment comes after Beeline’s recent approval for listing on Nasdaq under the symbol BLNE.

More about Eastside Distilling

Beeline Holdings, Inc. is a forward-thinking mortgage lender that leverages cutting-edge technology to simplify and streamline the home financing process. The company is committed to providing a seamless, customer-centric experience while expanding its presence in the mortgage industry.

data.title: Prairie Operating Co Promotes Gregory Patton to CFO
data.description:
Prairie Operating Co ( (PROP) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 11, 2025, Prairie Operating Co. announced the promotion of Gregory S. Patton to Chief Financial Officer, effective April 1, 2025. Patton, who joined the company as Executive Vice President of Commercial Development, succeeds Craig Owen, who is retiring after over 30 years in the energy industry. Patton’s extensive experience in corporate finance and capital markets is expected to further strengthen Prairie’s financial operations and align its capital strategy with long-term growth objectives. The transition is seen as a strategic move to maintain financial discipline and drive continued growth, creating long-term value for shareholders.

More about Prairie Operating Co

Prairie Operating Co. is a Houston-based publicly traded independent energy company engaged in the development and acquisition of oil and natural gas resources in the United States. The company’s operations are focused in the oil and liquids-rich regions of the Denver-Julesburg Basin, primarily targeting the Niobrara and Codell formations. Prairie Operating Co. is committed to responsible resource development, maximizing returns through consistent growth, capital discipline, and sustainable cash flow generation.

data.title: Nordic Mining ASA’s Subsidiary Completes Successful Tap Issue
data.description:
Nordic Mining ASA ( (DE:7NM0) ) has shared an announcement.

Nordic Mining ASA’s subsidiary, Engebø Rutile and Garnet AS, has successfully completed a USD 33 million tap issue for its 12.5% Senior Secured Bonds, increasing the total outstanding amount to USD 133 million. This financial move, facilitated by Clarksons Securities, strengthens the company’s capital structure and supports its operational and strategic initiatives.

More about Nordic Mining ASA

Nordic Mining ASA operates in the mining industry, focusing on the extraction and processing of minerals. Its primary products include rutile and garnet, with a market focus on supplying these minerals for various industrial applications.

data.title: Workhorse Group Announces Reverse Stock Split
data.description:
The latest update is out from Workhorse Group ( (WKHS) ).

On March 12, 2025, Workhorse Group Inc. announced a 1-for-12.5 reverse stock split of its common stock, effective March 17, 2025. This move aims to regain compliance with Nasdaq’s minimum bid price requirement, although there is no assurance of success. The reverse split will reduce the number of authorized common shares and adjust stockholder positions automatically, without affecting voting rights or ownership percentages.

More about Workhorse Group

Workhorse Group Inc. is a technology company focused on pioneering the transition to zero-emission commercial vehicles. The company designs and builds its vehicles in the United States at the Workhorse Ranch in Union City, Indiana, catering to last-mile delivery, medium-duty operations, and a growing range of specialized applications.
